extension.description: Connect ChatGPT to one VS Code Git repository through OpenAI Secure MCP Tunnel with read-only defaults and optional user-confirmed writes
capabilities.untrustedWorkspaces: ReviewLume can show workspace status in Restricted Mode, but commands that inspect or change repository content require Workspace Trust.
command.configureSecureMcpTunnel: ReviewLume: Configure OpenAI Secure MCP Tunnel
command.openSecureMcpTunnelUi: ReviewLume: Open Secure MCP Tunnel Diagnostics
command.copyMcpConnectionInfo: ReviewLume: Copy Local MCP Connection Info (Advanced)
config.mcp.maxToolResultBytes.descriptio: Maximum UTF-8 byte size returned by one MCP tool call. Larger diffs and search results are explicitly truncated.
config.mcp.writeAccess.description: Repository write capability exposed to ChatGPT. The default is read-only. Confirmed-write mode can only create or replace bounded text files and requires a VS Code confirmation for every effective batch.
config.mcp.writeAccess.disabled: Do not expose write tools. The MCP connection remains read-only.
config.mcp.writeAccess.confirmEachReques: Expose read-for-edit and write tools. Every effective write batch requires explicit confirmation in VS Code.
config.mcp.tunnelClientPath.description: Optional machine-local path to the official OpenAI tunnel-client executable. Runtime API keys are never stored in settings.
config.export.mode.automatic: Save automatically inside the active repository.
config.export.mode.askEveryTime: Ask for a destination every time.
config.export.mode.description: Automatically save Review Packs inside the active repository or ask for a destination every time.
config.export.directory.description: Repository-relative directory used by automatic Review Pack export. Absolute paths and parent traversal are rejected.
config.export.format.description: Output format used by automatic Review Pack export.
config.export.autoUpdateGitignore.descri: Silently add the repository-local automatic export directory to the active repository root .gitignore after a successful automatic export.
